name: shared
description: Cross-portal shared TypeScript surface: generated Supabase database types, business-rule constants mirrored from app/dukan/lib/config/business_rules.dart, currency formatters, capability-code enums.

scripts.types:gen:remote: test -n "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID" && supabase gen types typescript --project-id $SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID > src/database.types.ts || (echo 'Set SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID=<your-ref> first' && exit 1)
scripts.lint: echo 'shared package has no lint yet' && exit 0
